sections.paragraph:
Original: שׂוּכתי

Transliteration: śûkâthı̂y

Phonetic: soo-kaw-thee'

BDB Definition:

Suchathites = "bush-men"
  1. a family of scribes at Jabez and descendants of Judah through Caleb

Origin: probably patronymic from a name corresponding to H7754 (fem.)

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
